description: Automate the memory protocol so errors are auto-recorded on failure and past solutions are auto-recalled when encountering known error patterns. Removes reliance on manual 'up memory' invocation.

userStories.title: Error pattern extractor
userStories.description: Create a module that extracts searchable error signatures from task failures, verification output, and exception traces.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/memory/patterns.py with ErrorPatternExtractor class
extract(error_output: str) -> List[str] returns 1-3 search keywords from error text

Handles: Python tracebacks (extracts exception class + message), test failures (extracts test name + assertion), lint errors (extracts rule code + file), generic errors (extracts first meaningful line)
Strips noise: file paths, line numbers, timestamps, ANSI codes
Unit tests with real-world error samples in tests/test_error_patterns.py
userStories.notes: Foundation for auto-recall. Quality of extraction determines recall accuracy.

userStories.title: Auto-recall hook: search memory on task failure
userStories.description: Create a plugin hook that automatically searches memory when a task fails, looking for past solutions to similar errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .up/plugins/builtin/memory/hooks/auto_recall.py
Triggers on TASK_FAILED and VERIFY_FAIL events
Uses ErrorPatternExtractor to get search keywords from failure output
Searches memory via existing MemoryManager.search()
If matches found (similarity > 0.7): logs past solution to event data as 'memory_hint'
If no matches: silently continues (no noise)
Configurable in .up/config.json: automation.memory.auto_recall (default true)
Unit tests with mocked MemoryManager
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Uses Phase 1 hook pipeline for event integration.

userStories.title: Auto-record hook: save errors after consecutive failures
userStories.description: Create a plugin hook that automatically records error entries in memory after 2+ consecutive failures on the same task, preserving the error context and any eventual solution.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .up/plugins/builtin/memory/hooks/auto_record.py
Triggers on TASK_FAILED event when consecutive_failures >= 2
Records via MemoryManager.record(): error signature, full error output, task context, files involved
Also triggers on TASK_COMPLETE after previous failures: records the solution that worked
Deduplication: doesn't record if identical error signature exists within last 24 hours
Configurable threshold in .up/config.json: automation.memory.auto_record_threshold (default 2)
Unit tests with mocked MemoryManager
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Pairs with auto-recall to create a learning loop.

userStories.title: Auto-index hook: index commits into memory
userStories.description: Create a plugin hook that automatically indexes git commits into memory for semantic search across project history.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .up/plugins/builtin/memory/hooks/auto_index.py
Triggers on GIT_COMMIT event
Indexes: commit message, files changed, diff summary (first 500 chars)
Tags entries with: commit SHA, branch, author, timestamp
Batch-friendly: handles multiple commits (e.g., after merge) without flooding
Configurable in .up/config.json: automation.memory.auto_index_commits (default true)
Skips merge commits and commits with 'chore:' prefix
Unit tests with mocked git output
userStories.notes: Refactors existing auto-index logic from events.py into plugin hook format.

userStories.title: Memory hint injection into SESRC loop
userStories.description: When auto-recall finds relevant past solutions, inject them into the AI prompt during the EXECUTE phase of the SESRC loop.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/up/commands/start/loop.py EXECUTE phase to check for memory_hint in event data
If memory_hint exists: prepend to AI prompt as context block with header 'Past solution found:'
Format: 'Previously, a similar error was solved by: {solution}. Consider this approach.'
Memory hint is optional — loop works normally without it
Log when memory hint is used: 'Memory recall: applied hint from {date}'
Integration test: mock memory hit, verify prompt includes hint
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. This closes the loop: error → record → recall → inject → fix.

userStories.title: Builtin memory plugin manifest and registration
userStories.description: Package the auto-recall, auto-record, and auto-index hooks as the builtin memory plugin with proper manifest and hooks.json.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .up/plugins/builtin/memory/plugin.json with name 'memory', category 'safety'
Create .up/plugins/builtin/memory/hooks/hooks.json registering all 3 hooks with correct event matchers
auto_recall: matches TASK_FAILED, VERIFY_FAIL events
auto_record: matches TASK_FAILED, TASK_COMPLETE events
auto_index: matches GIT_COMMIT event
Update Phase 1 US-012 (up init) to include memory plugin in builtin setup
Integration test: full cycle — fail task, verify error recorded, fail again, verify recall triggered
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002, US-003, US-004. Packaging step.
